game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: This 2D sandbox adventure game allows players to explore vast, procedurally generated worlds, mine resources, craft items, build structures, and engage in combat against various enemies and bosses. The game features a dynamic day/night cycle influencing enemy spawns, and progression is driven by acquiring better tools, armor, and weapons through crafting and defeating bosses, which in turn unlock new materials, NPCs, and world events.
game_info.description: Pixel Miner is a 2D sandbox adventure where you explore a procedurally generated world. Mine resources, craft tools, build structures, and survive the night when monsters emerge. Gather enough resources to craft the ultimate item - the Portal - to win the game, but beware of the increasing difficulty as you progress!
game_info.controls:
Left Arrow: Move left
Right Arrow: Move right
Up Arrow: Jump
Down Arrow: Duck/Descend platforms
Z: Mine/Attack
Space: Place blocks/Use items
Shift: Switch between inventory items
Enter: Start game (at start screen)
Esc: Pause game
R: Restart game (at game over screen)
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests basic game functionality and stability by using random controls to explore the world, mine resources, and interact with the environment.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Randomly alternates between movement, jumping, mining, and placing blocks to stress test all game systems.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game runs without errors while the character explores, mines resources, places blocks, and interacts with the world.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests the win condition by efficiently gathering resources to craft the Portal.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Systematically mines required resources, crafts necessary tools, and builds the Portal to win the game.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Successfully crafts the Portal and triggers the win condition, reaching the GAME_OVER_WIN state.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests combat mechanics and player survival against enemies during night time.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Waits for night to fall, then engages with enemies using appropriate attack patterns and defensive movements.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully survives multiple enemy encounters without losing all health.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests crafting progression by gathering resources to craft increasingly better tools.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Focuses on mining specific resources needed for tool upgrades and follows the crafting progression chain.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Successfully crafts each tier of tools from wood to stone to iron to gold.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests building mechanics by constructing a protective shelter before nightfall.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Gathers resources and strategically places blocks to create a functional shelter with walls and a roof.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Completes a secure structure that protects the player from enemies during the night cycle.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
